title: Comparative Algorithm Analysis: A* vs Genetic Algorithm in Traffic Pathfinding
description: Analyzes and compares A* and Genetic Algorithms for pathfinding in simulated traffic networks using performance metrics like execution time, cost, and memory.

title: Java-Based Lexical Analyzer for Source Code Tokenization
description: Implements a lexical analyzer that tokenizes source code into keywords, identifiers, and operators, demonstrating compiler front-end concepts.

title: GitHub Repository Analyzer Using GitHub REST API
description: Analyzes GitHub repositories to extract insights such as commit trends, contributor activity, and language usage.

title: Custom Git Version Control System Implementation in Java
description: A simplified version of Git built in Java supporting commits, branching, and version tracking to understand VCS internals.

title: Sides: Collection of Small-Scale Coding Projects and Experiments
description: A continuously growing collection of small coding projects, experiments, and problem-solving tasks. Focused on exploring new concepts, improving coding efficiency, and testing ideas across different domains in a lightweight and iterative manner.
features: Collection of mini-projects and coding exercises
Covers multiple programming concepts and domains
